title: Seeded Random Integer
description: Import the random module, set the random seed to 5, generate a random integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive) using randint, and print it.
starter_code: # Import random, set seed, and print a random integer

code_requirements.fail_message: You must import the random module at the top of your code.
Call random.seed(5) before generating the random number.

code_requirements.description: Uses random.randint() to generate a random integer
code_requirements.fail_message: Use random.randint() to generate a random integer between 1 and 10.

hints: Start with 'import random' at the top
Call random.seed(5) to make the output predictable
Use print(random.randint(1, 10)) to generate and print the number
